Class UserCookiesTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.users.model.UserCookiesTBL
@Entity public class UserCookiesTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing user cookie/session records in the database.

This class maps to the user_cookies table and stores session information for users, including session keys, expiration dates, and device associations for "remember me" functionality.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • userloginid - User this session belongs to
  • deviceinformationid - Device associated with this session
  • sessionkey - Session key for authentication
  • expiredate - When the session expires
  • active - Whether the session is active
